title: Command Center OS Neural Interface
subtitle: Current generated interface for the root operating system: Operator Canon, intake, routing, memory, agents, build-time review, connectivity, output, and project workspace wiring.
humanInterfaceTruth: Human-facing architecture interfaces are truth surfaces. They must be updateable from a named source of truth at inception and during execution, not hand-maintained as disconnected artifacts.
commandSurfaceStatus: Accepted as a source-backed review artifact; not accepted as final command surface, live dashboard, or operational control system.

rootSpine.title: Command Center OS
rootSpine.description: the operator's root agentic operating system.

rootSpine.title: _operator/
rootSpine.description: Operator Canon: the operator's truth, voice, judgment, load, and approval standards.

rootSpine.title: _intake/
rootSpine.description: Single operator-facing drop lane at _intake/drop/ before the OS classification.

rootSpine.title: ROUTING.md + _routing/
rootSpine.description: Layer 1 destination logic, command architecture blueprint, proactive action, decision packets, and architecture source map.

rootSpine.title: _connectivity/
rootSpine.description: Layer 3 connectivity registry, permission classes, live-system stops, and tool boundary rules.

rootSpine.title: CONTEXT.md
rootSpine.description: Current root state and recovery instructions.

rootSpine.title: _output/
rootSpine.description: Local reviewable output lane inside the same workspace.

componentBreakdown.behavior: Holds identity, context, routing entrypoint, source folders, hook lane, output lane, and generated-interface source path.
componentBreakdown.estimate: AI: minimal interpretation during review. Everything else: root files, folders, JSON, scripts, hooks, and saved artifacts.

componentBreakdown.behavior: Carries the operator's operator truths, judgment, load, approval, and the Brand Guardian proof/refusal/correction standard.
componentBreakdown.estimate: AI: judgment when applying proof, refusal, or caveats to ambiguous work. Everything else: source-confirmed canon, status labels, and gate rules.

componentBreakdown.behavior: Decides where work belongs, what must load, which authority owns movement, and how unresolved work becomes a packet or handoff.
componentBreakdown.estimate: AI: low to moderate when edge cases require judgment. Everything else: load order, MUST/MUST NOT contracts, destination maps, and authority gates.

componentBreakdown.behavior: Gives roles contract-backed stages and invokes active review lenses before durable builds or generated artifacts move.
componentBreakdown.estimate: AI: moderate in judgment stages. Everything else: role folders, stage contracts, review standards, risk/signal packets, and handoff rules.

componentBreakdown.behavior: Preserves decisions, run records, source indexes, recovery paths, and corrections that should survive chat context loss.
componentBreakdown.estimate: AI: moderate for deciding what matters. Everything else: decision logs, run logs, memory router, source-improvement rules, and timestamp standards.

componentBreakdown.behavior: Gives unsorted input a drop lane, routes handoffs, and blocks connectivity/live-system movement until owner, permission, risk, and approval are explicit.
componentBreakdown.estimate: AI: low to moderate for classification and boundary exceptions. Everything else: intake contracts, handoff packets, connectivity registry, permission classes, and stop rules.

componentBreakdown.behavior: Renders source-backed review artifacts from _routing/architecture-map.json and keeps operator-facing architecture displays tied to truth sources.
componentBreakdown.estimate: AI: low. Mostly JSON source, generator script, deterministic validation, and generated HTML/Markdown outputs.

truthmodeComparison.title: Truthmode Cockpit Comparison
truthmodeComparison.source: Based on _governance/collideascopeos-atx-comparative-map.md and the observed CollideascopeOS image.
truthmodeComparison.judgment: CollideascopeOS is ahead as a revenue execution cockpit. the OS is ahead as a truth, governance, memory, routing, and boundary operating system.
truthmodeComparison.operatingLine: the OS has the deeper law. CollideascopeOS has the cleaner cockpit. the OS needs the cockpit without losing the law.

comparisonRows.collideascope: Revenue-facing lanes: client folders, CAC, monthly reports, SEO, paid media, CRM, content pipeline, firm finances.
comparisonRows.atx: Provenance-facing controls: source labels, approval state, memory router, decision logs, permission classes, project locality.
comparisonRows.assessment: CollideascopeOS surfaces operating metrics better. the OS protects data truth and source boundaries better.

comparisonRows.collideascope: Brand architecture, doctrine, audience language, diagnosis before tactics, and strategic drift audit.
comparisonRows.atx: Operator Canon, Brand Guardian oath, proof/refusal/correction, ICM layers, and meaning-before-output rules.
comparisonRows.assessment: the OS is stronger on meaning authority. CollideascopeOS is stronger at putting meaning directly into production lanes.

comparisonRows.collideascope: Faster visible routing for common client and firm production work.
comparisonRows.atx: Faster recovery, safer routing, stronger context preservation, and better prevention of wrong work.
comparisonRows.assessment: CollideascopeOS wins speed to production. the OS wins speed to durable correctness.

comparisonRows.collideascope: Visible specialists and MCP integrations create a practical revenue-ops cockpit.
comparisonRows.atx: Root law, role contracts, staged handoffs, build-time review, memory, and connectivity boundaries create a safer command OS.
comparisonRows.assessment: CollideascopeOS is more production-complete today. the OS is more extensible and governable.

performanceGaps.nextAction: Add source-driven visual sections for truth, routing, project status, execution lanes, and blocked states.
Expose only status-level client and venture lanes until project-local scaffolds prove active truth.
Prove active specialist handoffs under real work before adding more named roles.
Authorize project-local read, draft, or live lanes through connectivity registries before deeper integration.
Use _routing/low-risk-fast-lane-standard.md for reversible internal work with risk score 0-1.
Finish local governance, memory, connectivity, and handoff scaffolds for active projects before broader claims.

notes: Active project and resource folders inherit root governance, memory, routing, connectivity, and agent contracts according to lane type.
Root _connectivity/ is wired; ExampleAgency and ExampleWeb carry project-local connectivity boundaries, while ExampleOps and ExampleService require review before live-system use.
The architecture interface is now generated as the Command Center OS Neural Interface from the source map.
The underlying command architecture blueprint lives at _routing/atx-command-architecture-blueprint.md; the generated interface is a review artifact, not the architecture itself.
Command-surface acceptance lives at _routing/command-surface-acceptance-standard.md; current status is review artifact only.
Future queued roles, lanes, integrations, and lenses may be shown only as queued; they are not usable until their required contracts, structure, handoff paths, and active status exist.
Projects and resource lanes inherit Operator Canon only through explicit scope and local truth boundaries.
Unsorted non-sensitive files enter through _intake/drop/ before Librarian classifies them.
Project outputs stay in local stage output folders unless root routing places them in _output/.
ExampleFactory is an engine, not a project container; runtime outputs must route to a selected destination workspace.
ExampleService is wired for future value but remains dormant until the operator greenlights it.
Low-risk fast lane is available only for reversible internal work with clear source, clear destination, and Sentinel risk score 0-1.
ExampleVideo is approved as an empty placeholder and must not be scaffolded without a new the operator decision.
